description_long: This is a modern rectangular table with a flat, smooth gray tabletop and four slender, straight black legs positioned at each corner. The tabletop appears to be made of a solid, durable material, likely metal or laminate, with a uniform matte finish. The legs are thin and metallic, providing a minimalist and functional aesthetic suitable for urban environments. There are no visible decorative elements, drawers, or additional features, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The table's proportions suggest it is intended for communal or work-related use, such as in parks, public plazas, or outdoor seating areas. Its construction appears robust enough to withstand frequent use and exposure to the elements.
description: A minimalist rectangular table with a smooth gray top and four slender black metal legs, designed for functional urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow edge of the gray tabletop and two black legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the tabletop and all four black legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the narrow tabletop edge and two legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the full tabletop and all four legs visible.
